hero.headline: Rank Higher. Be Found First. Win Organically.
hero.subheadline: Technical, on-page, and off-page SEO that builds lasting search visibility — not just short-term ranking spikes.

body: Paid ads stop the moment you stop paying. SEO builds an asset — a search presence that earns traffic, leads, and revenue on autopilot.
Our SEO programmes cover every dimension: technical site health, content depth, on-page optimisation, link acquisition, and local SEO — executed in a structured, measurable roadmap.
We work with your development, content, and PR teams. SEO at Shyama Overseas is a company-wide growth system.

inlineStats.label: Clients in Top 3 for primary keywords

approach.title: Technical SEO Audit
approach.description: Crawl your site for indexation errors, Core Web Vitals failures, redirect chains, duplicate content, and structured data gaps.

approach.title: Keyword Strategy
approach.description: Build a full keyword universe segmented by intent and prioritised by opportunity score.

approach.title: On-Page Optimisation
approach.description: Rewrite meta titles, descriptions, heading hierarchies, and internal linking on high-potential pages.

approach.title: Content Gap Programme
approach.description: Identify topics competitors rank for that you don't — and build content assets to close those gaps.

approach.title: Link Acquisition
approach.description: Outreach-based link building using digital PR, resource pages, and partnership programmes — all white-hat.

approach.title: Monitor, Report, Iterate
approach.description: Monthly ranking reports, organic traffic attribution, and algorithm-update response protocols.

features.title: Technical SEO
features.description: Site architecture, crawlability, Core Web Vitals, schema markup, and mobile-first indexing.

features.title: On-Page SEO
features.description: Title tags, meta descriptions, heading structures, and content depth optimised for humans and search engines.

features.title: Link Building
features.description: White-hat outreach and digital PR to earn high-authority backlinks that move rankings.

features.title: Local SEO
features.description: Google Business Profile optimisation, local citations, and geo-targeted content.

features.title: International SEO
features.description: Hreflang implementation, geo-targeting, and international content for global reach.

features.title: SEO Reporting & Analytics
features.description: Rank tracking, organic traffic attribution, and conversion reporting in one dashboard.

hero.title: Traffic that compounds
hero.description: Once you earn organic rankings, they deliver traffic, leads, and revenue month after month with no additional spend.

list.title: Long-term competitive moat
list.description: A strong organic position takes years for competitors to displace.

list.title: Lowest cost-per-lead at scale
list.description: As rankings grow, CPL from organic outperforms every paid channel.

list.title: Algorithm-resilient strategy
list.description: Our approach follows search quality guidelines — not shortcuts that risk penalties.

list.title: Topical authority building
list.description: We build depth across your whole topic cluster, not just isolated rankings.

cta.headline: Your Competitors Are Ranking. You Should Be Too.
cta.supporting: A free SEO audit reveals exactly what's holding your site back — and how to fix it.
